summary: Excellent audience recording (near‑board) of a scorching show highlighted by a stellar Scarlet > Fire sequence.
review: Both reviewers award five stars, praising Charlie Miller’s upgrade that brings this audience tape up to near‑soundboard quality. The performance is described as one of the hottest of the year, with the Scarlet > Fire segue singled out as a top‑tier 80s rendition. No technical flaws are noted, making it a must‑listen for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high (5‑star) praise for both the musical performance and the upgraded audience recording, with no negative comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Upgraded by Charlie Miller; described as a 'near board' transfer with crystal‑clear sound despite being an audience source. No dropouts or muddiness reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy throughout; the show is called one of the hottest of the year with a particularly powerful Scarlet > Fire segue.
